pages.text: When the Cradle has fuel enough, it summons. Hostility and Anomaly form a two-by-two: every spawn lands in one of four corners, with Disease layered on top as tumours.
pages.title: What the Cradle Births

pages.name: The Flesh Blob
pages.text: The calm, ordinary corner — a harmless $(flesh)Flesh Blob$(). It will not attack you. This is the corner you want: calm blobs are the safe, repeatable source of Living Flesh.

$(bold)The four corners:$()$(br)$(li)$(bold)Calm + ordinary$() — a plain Flesh Blob. The goal.$(li)$(bold)Hungry + ordinary$() — a $(flesh)Hungry Flesh Blob$(): an active attacker with buffed damage.$(li)$(bold)Calm + primordial$() — a $(flesh)Primordial Flesh Blob$(): tougher, its own attribute curve, some damage immunities.$(li)$(bold)Hungry + primordial$() — both at once. Dangerous; spawn one only on purpose.

$(bold)Size and disease.$() Blobs spawn at a range of sizes — bigger blobs carry more, and drop more when killed. Disease shows as tumours growing on the body; heavily diseased blobs are ugly but not necessarily stronger. A clean, large, calm blob is the ideal harvest.
pages.title: Size & Tumours
